Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Continued To Aug-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Review Of The Status Of The Disposition Of Reserve Funds
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Wohl for (petitioner) Robert Farac.

The Court asked if four months will be sufficient to determine the property in Malta. Mr. Wohl stated that they are on a different time frame in Malta, that they need government I.D., that a death certificate and letters of administration are not sufficient and that the beneficiaries have not expressed concern regarding the length of time. The Court expressed concern about this extending out longer, continued the status review of the disposition of reserve funds to June 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and stated that if there is no further progress on the Malta property distribution will go forward.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Wohl for Robert Farac (Petitioner).

Mr. Wohl addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to rents, payment to a tax accountant for preparation of the accounting and fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
